data.title_en: Invocation for someone you have spoken ill to

items.chapter_title_en: Invocation for someone you have spoken ill to
items.arabic_text: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((اللَّهُمَّ فَأَيُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ سَبَبْتُهُ فَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ لَهُ قُرْبَةً إِلَيْكَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, to any believer whom I have insulted, let that be cause to draw him near to You on the Day of Resurrection.)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma fa-ayyuma mu/minin sababtuhu fajAAal thalika lahu qurbatan ilayka yawmal-qiyamah.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma fa-ayyuma mu/minin sababtuhu fajAAal thalika lahu qurbatan ilayka yawmal-qiyamah.)
